title: Immunofluorescent staining of dopaminergic neurons in brains of D. melanogaster
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"due4n","text":"This protocol is used to visualize for dopaminergic neurons in Drosophila brains, but can be adapted for other targets as well.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"1j3et","text":"Rabbit polyclonal anti-TH, Millipore,  Cat# AB152, RRID: AB_390204","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cl6na","text":"Mouse monoclonal anti-DLG, DSHB, DSHB Cat# 4F3 anti-discs large; RRID: AB_528203","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"29ko1","text":"Goat anti-Rabbit IgG Alexa Fluor‱ 488, Life Technologies, Cat# A-11034 RRID: AB_2576217","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":32,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"6la25","text":"Goat anti-Mouse IgG Alexa Fluor‱ 555, Life Technologies, Cat# A-21424 RRID: AB_141780","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":31,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"8pk29","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1uta5","text":"RapiClear 1.47, Sunjin Lab, Cat# RC147001","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"69udh","text":"Triton X-100 Solution, Sigma Aldrich, Cat# 93443-100ML","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2hcns","text":"Formaldehyde solution (37 wt. % in H2O) F1635-500ml, Sigma-Aldrich","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"6C6D1739445911EF829A0A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}},"1":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"7A8B24B9445911EFA8820A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}}}}
steps: Prepare fresh 3.7% paraformaldehyde in 1x PBS, 0.2% Triton X-100 (PBX), 500 µL per genotype and store On ice .
Dissect fly brains in ice-cold PBS under stereomicroscope, collect with a PBX coated pipette and transfer in the 3.7% paraformaldehyde solution.
Store the dissected fly brains in paraformaldehyde solution on ice, but do not keep fly brains longer than 01:00:00 On ice
Incubate the dissected fly brains in paraformaldehyde solution on rotation wheel for 00:30:00 at Room temperature
Take the paraformaldehyde solution off and wash a first time with PBX 0.2% ( 500 µL ) and take itoff right away
Wash 3 times with PBX 0.2% ( 500 µL ) for 15 min on a rotator at Room temperature
Block with 10% NGS in PBX ( 500 µL ) for 01:00:00 on rotator at Room temperature
Add primary antibody (in 500 µL of 10% NGS in PBX) put it on rotation wheel at 4 °C 48:00:00
Take the primary antibody solution off and wash a first time with PBX 0.2% ( 500 µL ) and takeit off right away
Wash 3 times with PBX 0.2% ( 500 µL ) for 15 min on a rotator at Room temperature
Add secondary antibody (in 500 µL of 10% NGS in PBX), cover with tinfoil and put it on rotation wheel at 4 °C Overnight
Take the secondary antibody solution off and wash a first time with PBX 0.2% ( 500 µL ) and takeit off right away
Wash 3 times with PBX 0.2% ( 500 µL ) for 15 min on a rotator at Room temperature
prepare slides:
clean slides with EtOH
place 2 book binder rings on top of each other
fill book binder rings with 0.075% PLL solution, leave minimum 00:15:00 , take the solution off and leave a thin layer to dry

Mount fly brains by pipetting the brains next to the book binders, fill the book binder chamber with PBX and transfer the brains individually with forceps to the book binder chamber, orient the brains correctly with anterior facing up (antenna lobe up) and softly push down until they stick
remove PBX
add 8 μl of mounting medium (RapiClear 1.47) by gently pipetting on top of brains
add glass coverslip, seal with nail polish and let cure overnight at 4 °C in dark
Use rabbit a-TH, Sigma, 1:200, and mouse a-DLG, DSHB, 1:100
Use Goat anti-Rabbit IgG Alexa Fluor‱ 488, Life Technologies, and Goat anti-Mouse IgG Alexa Fluor‱ 555, Life Technologies, at 1:500 dilution.
creator: Natalie Kaempf
